Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.

- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments.

- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).

1	//
2	//  ContactManagerUITests.swift
3	//  ContactManagerUITests
4	//
5	//  End-to-end smoke tests against a live ContactManager.app process.
6	//
7	//  Each test launches a fresh app instance with the
8	//  `CONTACTMANAGER_UI_TEST_MODE` environment variable set, which makes
9	//  the app delete its on-disk store and re-seed the standard three
10	//  sample contacts (Ada Lovelace, Alan Turing, Grace Hopper) before
11	//  loading. The `-ApplePersistenceIgnoreState YES` launch argument
12	//  disables SwiftUI window-state restoration so the test doesn't
13	//  inherit a stale identifier from a previous run.
14	//
15	//  Scope is intentionally narrow: the unit-test layer (`ContactStore`,
16	//  `VCard`, `CSV`, `ContactEntity`, `DuplicateFinder`, …) already
17	//  exercises every CRUD / group / import / undo / dedup journey at the
18	//  data layer. These UI tests guard against the regressions the unit
19	//  tests can't catch — the app fails to launch, the menu bar drops a
20	//  command, the seeded data doesn't render — without trying to drive
21	//  every interactive widget through XCUITest's macOS quirks.
22	//
23	
24	import XCTest
25	
26	final class ContactManagerUITests: XCTestCase {
27	    private var app: XCUIApplication!
28	
29	    override func setUpWithError() throws {
30	        continueAfterFailure = false
31	    }
32	
33	    override func tearDownWithError() throws {
34	        app?.terminate()
35	    }
36	
37	    // MARK: - Launch + menus
38	
39	    /// Smoke test: the app launches under `CONTACTMANAGER_UI_TEST_MODE`
40	    /// and the main window renders. Catches the "WindowGroup body
41	    /// silently rendered EmptyView" failure mode the unit tests can't
42	    /// see — the rest of the journey (seeded data, list interaction,
43	    /// edits) is covered by the unit-test layer.
44	    func test_appLaunchesWithMainWindow() {
45	        let app = bootSeededApp()
46	        XCTAssertTrue(app.windows.firstMatch.exists)
47	        // The search field anchors the contact-list toolbar; if it's
48	        // present the main list rendered, not the StoreErrorView fallback.
49	        XCTAssertTrue(
50	            app.searchFields.firstMatch.waitForExistence(timeout: 3),
51	            "Contact-list search field should render"
52	        )
53	    }
54	
55	    /// Verifies the File menu wires the Import / Export commands the
56	    /// unit tests can't probe directly.
57	    func test_fileMenuExposesImportAndExportCommands() {
58	        let app = bootSeededApp()
59	        app.menuBars.menuBarItems["File"].click()
60	        XCTAssertTrue(app.menuItems["New Contact"].exists)
61	        XCTAssertTrue(app.menuItems["Import from Contacts…"].exists)
62	        XCTAssertTrue(app.menuItems["Import vCard…"].exists)
63	        XCTAssertTrue(app.menuItems["Import CSV…"].exists)
64	        XCTAssertTrue(app.menuItems["Export vCard…"].exists)
65	    }
66	
67	    /// Verifies Edit ▸ Find Duplicates… opens the sheet. Sheet content
68	    /// is covered by `DuplicateFinder` + `ContactStore.merge` unit tests.
69	    func test_findDuplicatesShortcutOpensTheSheet() {
70	        let app = bootSeededApp()
71	        app.typeKey("d", modifierFlags: [.command, .shift])
72	        XCTAssertTrue(
73	            app.buttons["Done"].waitForExistence(timeout: 3),
74	            "Duplicates sheet's Done button should appear after ⌘⇧D"
75	        )
76	    }
77	
78	    // MARK: - Helpers
79	
80	    /// Launches a fresh app instance with the seeded UI-test container.
81	    /// Returns the `XCUIApplication` so each test can scope its
82	    /// assertions to a known-good handle.
83	    private func bootSeededApp() -> XCUIApplication {
84	        app = XCUIApplication()
85	        app.launchEnvironment["CONTACTMANAGER_UI_TEST_MODE"] = "1"
86	        app.launchArguments = ["-ApplePersistenceIgnoreState", "YES"]
87	        app.launch()
88	        XCTAssertTrue(
89	            app.windows.firstMatch.waitForExistence(timeout: 10),
90	            "Main window didn't appear within 10s"
91	        )
92	        return app
93	    }
94	}

---
name: contactmanager-modernization
description: Direction and PR roadmap for modernizing the ContactManager macOS app
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: a22e27bd-7ce5-4bdb-b1b8-083a9eedbb19
---

The ContactManager app (an old ObjC/AppKit + Core Data + XIB demo) is being rebuilt into a **native macOS Tahoe (macOS 26) app**. Decisions confirmed by the user on 2026-05-25:

- **Full SwiftUI rewrite** (NavigationSplitView: sidebar / list / detail, Liquid Glass).
- **SwiftData** as the persistence layer (replacing Core Data).
- Wants **all four feature areas**: search & alphabetical sections, contact photos (initials fallback), richer fields (multiple emails/phones, company/title, address, birthday, notes), groups/tags + vCard import/export.

**Why:** User wants the app to keep evolving toward a polished native Tahoe contact manager; it doubles as a best-practices demo.

**How to apply:** Ship as focused, single-purpose PRs (matching the existing PR #1–#8 workflow), each building cleanly. Roadmap + status:
- PR A — Foundation ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #9. SwiftUI+SwiftData shell, CRUD, seed data, macOS 26, ObjC/XIB removed, Swift Testing.
- PR B — Richer fields ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #11 (originally #10; see lesson below). ContactField child entity (labeled emails/phones), company/title/address/birthday/notes, grouped Form editor.
- PR C — Search & sections ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #12. Live search, alphabetical sections + "#", Last/First name sort toggle (@AppStorage).
- PR D — Contact photos ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #13. External-storage photoData, photo well in detail, ImageProcessing downscaling, off-main processing.
- PR E — Groups & vCard ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #14. ContactGroup many-to-many, sidebar group CRUD, detail membership toggles, pure vCard 3.0 reader/writer + File import/export.
- PR F — Tahoe Liquid Glass polish ✅ MERGED — GitHub PR #15. Glass-prominent action buttons, list/selection/avatar animations, min window size.

Tooling/conventions: PR #16 (`chore/lint-format-and-conventions`) adds SwiftLint + SwiftFormat (configs `.swiftlint.yml`/`.swiftformat`), a Makefile, a SwiftLint build phase, and a root `CLAUDE.md`. Run `make check` (format-check + lint + test) before opening PRs; conventions live in CLAUDE.md (loaded each session). SwiftFormat owns comma/brace style; SwiftLint's trailing_comma is disabled and wrapMultilineStatementBraces is disabled to keep the two consistent + idempotent.

ROADMAP COMPLETE as of 2026-05-26: all six PRs (#9, #11, #12, #13, #14, #15) merged to main. App is a native SwiftUI + SwiftData macOS 26 contact manager; 21 Swift Testing tests across 3 suites green on main. Future work would be net-new (e.g., CloudKit sync, contact dedup, vCard PHOTO round-trip, AppKit→SwiftUI inspector).

Liquid Glass note (macOS 26.5 SDK): `.glassEffect()` modifier and `GlassEffectContainer` are NOT in the SwiftUI swiftinterface, but `.buttonStyle(.glass)` / `.buttonStyle(.glassProminent)` (GlassButtonStyle/GlassProminentButtonStyle) and `.backgroundExtensionEffect()` ARE. Toolbars + NavigationSplitView adopt Liquid Glass automatically when built against the SDK.

As of 2026-05-25, #9 and #11 are MERGED into main; 9 Swift tests green on main.

Copilot review fixes already applied (don't regress): error-state container load with "Reset Data" (no fatalError), save-error alerts + rollback in ContentView, throwing SampleData.seedIfNeeded, deterministic avatar color from createdAt (not hashValue/abs), ContactField sortIndex = max+1.

Key learnings:
- Toolchain: Xcode 26.5, macOS 26.5 SDK, Swift 6.3 (SWIFT_VERSION 5.0 in project). Project `.pbxproj` restructured via the Ruby `xcodeproj` gem (available), not hand-edited. App icon from PR #7 preserved.
- SwiftData tests: use `@Suite(.serialized)` + `@MainActor`, hold the `ModelContainer` as a stored property, and have the host app skip building its own container while testing (`XCTestConfigurationFilePath` env) — concurrent/duplicate containers for the same `@Model` trap SwiftData.
- SwiftData migration: new non-optional scalar attributes MUST have inline defaults (e.g. `var city: String = ""`) or in-place migration fails with NSCocoaError 134110.
- No display access in this environment — cannot screencapture the running app; verify via build + tests + headless launch (process stays alive).
- `gh pr merge --delete-branch` deletes the LOCAL branch too, and deleting a base branch of a stacked PR CLOSES the dependent PR (GitHub won't retarget, and a closed PR whose base is gone can't be reopened/retargeted). For stacked PRs: merge the base PR, then retarget the child PR to main BEFORE deleting the base branch — or just recreate the child PR from its branch (that's what happened: #10 closed → recreated as #11).

#!/usr/bin/env ruby
# Remove the stray Cocoa.framework reference (and its empty 'OS X' / Frameworks
# wrapper groups) that the prior xcodeproj-gem script added to the
# ContactManagerUITests target. UI-test bundles don't need Cocoa.framework
# linked, and the file reference points at a pinned MacOSX15.0.sdk path which
# is wrong for this macOS 26 project.

require "xcodeproj"

project_path = File.expand_path(
  "../ContactManager.xcodeproj",
  File.dirname(__FILE__).sub(%r{/tmp$}, "")
)
# Fall back to the workspace path the user normally drives from.
project_path = "/Users/scottdensmore/Developer/scottdensmore/contactmanager/ContactManager.xcodeproj"

project = Xcodeproj::Project.open(project_path)

# 1. Drop the Cocoa.framework PBXFileReference + its containing 'OS X' /
#    'Frameworks' groups if they only ever held that framework.
cocoa_refs = project.files.select { |f| f.path&.include?("Cocoa.framework") }
cocoa_refs.each do |ref|
  parent = ref.parent
  ref.remove_from_project
  next unless parent.is_a?(Xcodeproj::Project::Object::PBXGroup)
  next unless parent.children.empty?
  grandparent = parent.parent
  parent.remove_from_project
  next unless grandparent.is_a?(Xcodeproj::Project::Object::PBXGroup)
  next unless grandparent.children.empty?
  grandparent.remove_from_project
end

# 2. Strip any orphan PBXBuildFile entries that pointed at the now-removed
#    Cocoa.framework file reference (xcodeproj usually GCs these but the
#    earlier script may have inserted them by hand).
project.objects.select { |o| o.isa == "PBXBuildFile" && o.file_ref.nil? }
       .each(&:remove_from_project)

# 3. Empty out the UI-test target's Frameworks build phase. (We keep the phase
#    so Xcode doesn't try to recreate it on next open.)
ui_target = project.targets.find { |t| t.name == "ContactManagerUITests" }
abort "ContactManagerUITests target missing" unless ui_target
ui_target.frameworks_build_phase.files.clear

project.save
puts "Cleaned Cocoa.framework references from #{project_path}"

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add XCUITest target with launch + menu smoke tests

Adds a ContactManagerUITests bundle that launches the app under a
CONTACTMANAGER_UI_TEST_MODE env flag (wipes the on-disk store and
re-seeds Ada/Alan/Grace) so we catch failure modes the unit-test
layer can't see: WindowGroup rendering EmptyView, missing File-menu
commands, ⌘⇧D not opening the duplicates sheet. The flag also
pre-empts the existing XCTestCase guard in loadContainer so the UI
test process actually builds the real container instead of returning
.testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git log --oneline -3
